Winning Opening Lines vs. Weak Opening Lines
Examples of a weak opening line
We all know it’s true…
The food we eat has a big impact on our health.
Which influences how we look and feel each day.
And a new study from Harvard confirms this.
Researchers recently…
-----
Winning opening line
Brand new research from a group of Harvard scientists just might hold the
key to looking & feeling 10-15 years younger than you actually are.
Here’s how…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 7 --

Weak opening line
LAZY? It works… So You Don’t Have to!
‘SELF PERPETUATING’ INCOME (SPI)?
Once You Turn It On – It Continues To Generate Inc0me
EXPLAINED: The definition of self perpetuating is;
something that once started continues to work without
intervention…
Winning opening line
Jeff Reed has always been a bit of a “slacker”, yet he still
made $137,000 last year working from home.
Lee Muller has a similar story. He barely finished
highschool. And later failed out of Crenshaw Community
College (which is almost impossible to do).
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 7 --

Yet Lee was able to make $71,800 last year without a
“real job”.
Weak opening line
Have you ever thought about why gurus tell you that you
need to have a big following?
I don’t have any of that.
etc...
Winning opening line
Hey it’s Sam Ovens here, and I am not an author,
speaker, or investor.
In fact, I have:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 7 --

0 Lamborghinis
0 Jets
0 Rented Mansions
0 Stages Spoken On
0 Social Media Presence
0 Bitecoins Owned
0 Side Hustles
0 Books Authored
0 Degrees
0 Motivational Videos
0 Slick Hair Cuts
0 3-Piece Suits
Zero.
Here’s what I do have.
etc...
Good Opening lines
When menopause makes you miserable, modern medicine gives you 2 options…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Take hormones or stick your head in the freezer!
So I asked the Wilen Sisters what they recommend. “Easy” they said. “Cookies and Waffles!”

Plop, plop, fizz, fizz. Oh what a sparkling silver ring or necklace it is. Here’s our favorite quick
relief for tarnished silver jewelry…
------
Yuck! There’s nothing worse than opening a bag of lettuce and finding brown spots.
It’s not just that it’s icky. Greens are expensive - especially those pre-packaged mixes!
But there’s something you can do to lettuce, kale, mustard greens or any salad green to keep
them fresh and crisp.
-------
Considered more precious than gold in medieval times, salt does much more than add a little
spice to life.
-----
There’s a reason commercial pesticides kill weeds…
They’re poisonous! To you. To your family. To your pets and to the environment.
Plus, they ain’t cheap either!
So why not mix up your own?
------
We dubbed vinegar the “versatility king” because it works miracles inside and outside your
home --- and your body.
Why is it so versatile? It’s a solvent, yet it’s gentle enough to drink!
------
Think breast cancer is the #1 threat for women?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

------
A UCLA study found that 51% of patients with Type 2 diabetes (the most common form) were
able to reverse it in just three weeks with simple dietary changes.
----
Believe it or not, pneumonia is the eighth leading cause of DEATH in the United States. And
the scientists are in a quiet panic about the super flu strains spreading like wildfire.
----
Not too long ago in the jungles of Brazil, a scientist noted that when people were bitten by the
poisonous jaraca snake, they experienced a dramatic drop in blood pressure.
----
A shocking new study in the Journal of American Geriatrics Society found that people who care
for a spouse with dementia are a terrifying six times more likely to develop dementia
themselves. Six times!
-----
Video games are bad for your brain, right? Wrong! A group of video-game-loving
neurobiologists recently proved that xxx
----
You may have heard that red wine is good for your heart health. What you may not know is that
red wine also lowers your risk for dementia.
----
Greg Anderson’s lung cancer looked hopeless by any reasonable measure.
After he had a lung removed, the cancer cropped up in his lymph system. Doctors gave him a
month to live, but he set out to find his own cure - and 20 amazing years later, he’s still cancer
free!

Famed nutritionist Dr. Barbara Rolls of Penn State wants to save millions of Americans from
starving on pointless diets.
-----
Thousands who have triumphed over cancer owe their lives to an ex-coal miner who never
finished highschool.
Because for many years, he quietly shared an herbal formula passed down through his family
for generations.
Scientists heard the stories and wondered: Could this really be a miraculous treatment for
cancer?
-----
Researchers in Europe were amazed to find an overlooked vitamin that reduces deaths from
heart disease in half.
----
Beginning in the 1920’s a tea promoted by a Canadian nurse began healing cancer patients
around the world.
----
Courageous researcher Ruth Lerman MD, announced this magnificent breakthrough on TV and
shares the details inside.
